title: Settings
desc: Settings are saved to config.json in the project folder. Changes automatically reconnect all MCP servers.

ollamaUrl.label: Ollama URL
ollamaUrl.hint: Local addresses only (localhost / 127.0.0.1). Data must not be sent to any third party.

model.label: Model name
model.hint: Must support tool calling, e.g. qwen2.5, gpt-oss:20b.

pythonPath.label: Python path
pythonPath.hint: The Python interpreter used to launch all MCP servers.

dbPath.label: SQLite database path
dbPath.hint: Passed to each MCP server via MIMIC_DB_PATH (servers that don't need a database ignore it).

localWarn: Must be a local address, otherwise it will be blocked.
mcpSectionDesc: Each server is an independent Python stdio subprocess. You can enable/disable and edit the script path.

model.customPlaceholder: Enter a model name, e.g. gpt-oss:20b
model.noModels: No models detected. Install one with ollama pull first.
model.detectedCount_one: Detected {{count}} local model; choose "Custom…" to type manually.
model.detectedCount_other: Detected {{count}} local models; choose "Custom…" to type manually.

test.ollamaModelMissing: (⚠️ the configured model "{{model}}" is not in the list)
test.dbMissing: Not found: {{path}}. Build it with build_db.py or fix the path.
test.mcpNone: No enabled MCP server, or reconnection failed.

save.ok: Saved and reconnected: {{connected}}/{{total}} servers connected, {{tools}} tools total.
save.partial: Saved, but no server connected successfully. Please check the paths.
